calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:41am and concluding at 9:52am.

Plaintiff The Housing Guild Management Co, Inc. appearing represented by Stan Riddell, Esq.
Defendant Rodriguez, Ramirez, Inc. not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff and custodian of records MATTHEW BINCZEK and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff The Housing Guild Management CO., and against Defendant Rodriguez, Ramirez, Inc., as follows:

Damages: $68,250.00
Prejudgment Interest: $13,081.00
Attorney Fees: $8,700.00
Costs: $507.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $90,538.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-28-2026 Continued To Feb-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff The Housing Guild Management Co., Inc. appearing represented by Stanley Riddell.
Defendant Rodriguez, Ramirez not appearing.

There were no courtesdy copies provided to this department prior to this date. This matter is continued to February 11, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow Plaintiff an oppertunity to provide paper courtesy copies.
